title: 1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e8t2g","text":"Our capillary-driven microfluidic chips automatically detect multiple SARS-CoV-2 antigens after the addition of a few drops of saliva, triggering a cascade of events powered by capillary forces. We integrate biochemical reagents directly on the microfluidic chips, avoiding the need for peripheral equipment for fluid control. Thus, detection of SARS-CoV-2 can be done at the patient’s side by simply adding sample to the chips, with minimal hands-on time, faster results, and increased sensitivity of fluorescence assays. The use of saliva as a sample matrix avoids painful sample-collection procedures and the need for trained medical staff.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"e3k3d","text":"For in vitro diagnostic use ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"66hqa","text":"For use with the 1DROP Analyzer ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":32}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f04q0","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"19q5m","text":"This test is designed only for the detection of proteins from SARS-CoV-2, not for any other viruses or pathogens.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c37en","text":" Store kit at 2-30°C. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f2ugu","text":"Do not reuse any 1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test components. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4dkv1","text":"Freshly collected specimens should be processed as soon as possible, but no later than one hour after specimen collection. ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"a4knh","text":"All components must be at room temperature before use. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"tmjf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d00gv","text":"Refrain from consuming food or beverage (including water) for 30 minutes before providing a saliva sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"35uqc","text":"The 1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test kit is stable until the expiration date marked on the outer packaging and container.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4pp5l","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4hac","text":"        1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test Chip      Collection   Tube, 50 mL      Reagent Tube,   2 mL      Buffer      Calibrated   disposable Pipette     ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":152}],"data":[]},{"key":"b0qc7","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"_dt-bold","1_0":"","2_0":"","3_0":"","4_0":"","5_0":"_dt-bold","6_0":"","7_0":""},"colWidths":[162],"data":[["Consumables in 1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test kit"],["1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test Chip"],["Collection Tube, 50 mL"],["Reagent Tube,  2 mL, containing Buffer"],["Calibrated disposable Pipette"],["Equipment"],["1DROP  Analyzer"],["Watch or  timer"]],"guid":"62503B1EF1AA11EA834B0A58A9FEAC2A","legend":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"c0n1t","text":"List of Material required for 1DROP SARS-CoV-2 antigen test protocol","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":[]},"mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23],"show_headers":true}}}}
steps: Collect patient saliva in the Collection Tube. Saliva must be collected until the amount reaches above the 1 mL line.
Switch on the 1DROP Analyzer with the side switch.
Scan the Chip on the scanner of the 1DROP Analyzer.
Follow instructions on the screen to enter patient ID.

Use the Pipette to transfer 500 µL of saliva to the Reagent Tube containing the Buffer. To transfer the patient sample: Firmly squeeze the top bulb of the Pipette. Still squeezing, place the Pipette tip into the saliva sample. With the Pipette tip still in the sample, release pressure on the bulb to fill the Pipette up to 500 µL Place the Pipette in the Reaction Tube containing the Buffer. Firmly squeeze the bulb to empty the contents of the Pipette in the Reaction Tube.
Pipette up and down the reagent mix in the Reagent Tube 5 times.
Just prior to loading the sample, pipet up and down two more times the prepared sample in the Reagent Tube.
Fill the Pipette and transfer 4 drops to the loading pad of the Chip. Apply light pressure to the Pipette bulb, to dispense the liquid drop by drop and stop pressing after the fourth drop is out.
Once the sample have been loaded, start a timer for 00:15:00 .

After 15 minutes, insert the Chip in the 1DROP Analyzer slit and press "Start" on the screen. The result will be displayed on the 1DROP Analyzer screen. %s %s * Repeat the test with another Chip go to step #6 (same sample mix can be reused).
Once the results have been read, remove the Chip from the 1DROP Analyzer and switch off the Analyzer.
Once done, discard the Chip, the Pipette, the Collection Tube, and the Reagent Tube as biohazard waste.
creator: Mahe Raccaud
